evals.prompt: What project templates do you have available?
evals.expected_output: Lists all four catalog entries from templates/manifest.yml (Sprint Board, OKR Roadmap, Bug-Triage Board, Feature Pipeline) with a one-line description each.
expectations: Lists all four templates from templates/manifest.yml: sprint-board, okr-roadmap, bug-triage-board, feature-pipeline
Gives at least a one-line description per template
Does not fabricate a template that isn't in the manifest

evals.prompt: We track OKRs — set up a project template for that on acme/product.
evals.expected_output: Maps the cue "we track OKRs" to the okr-roadmap template per the manifest's cues list, then hands off to the project-setup agent with that template name.

deterministic_checks.description: Matches the OKR cue to the okr-roadmap template
Hands off to the project-setup agent rather than instantiating anything itself

expectations: Matches the okr-roadmap template from the conversational cue, not a different template
Hands off to project-setup (or clearly states it will) with the matched template name rather than instantiating anything itself

evals.prompt: Use the 'sprint-board' template for acme/widgets, but the org's source template project was deleted last week.
evals.expected_output: Detects that the manifest's named source org template project no longer resolves, says so explicitly, and falls back to the agent's blank-createProjectV2 path rather than failing silently.

deterministic_checks.description: Explicitly states the source template could not be found

expectations: Explicitly states that the stale catalog entry's source template could not be found
Falls back to blank project creation rather than erroring out with no explanation
Does not claim the template was successfully cloned when it was not
